NOTICE OF MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST-JUDGMENT DISCOVERY AND FOR AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE  ASSOCIATION, INC., DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU HEARING SET FOR MAY-07-2010 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 610
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-07-2010 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 610

DISCOVERY 610, PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST-JUDGMENT DISCOVERY IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $340, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT. NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-07-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'s Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported. (EAH/612)
